title: Welcome to my Formatted Blog!
content:
This text is normal. But if I want, I can make text **bold** or *italic*. 

### Look, a Sub-Heading! 

Here is a bulleted list of features:
- Rich text formatting
- Cool Pro UI Buttons
- Completely free hosting

> This is a blockquote. It looks very professional for quoting important things.

Now, here is a normal link to [Google](https://google.com) mixed into my sentence. 

But if I put a link on its own line below this paragraph, it becomes a button:

[Join my Discord Server](https://discord.com)
